zh.lifeSummary: Sir John de Insula是Sir Baldwin de Insula和Joan的兒子，於1303年2月2日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特加可姆。他於大約1323年與Joan在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特加可姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John de Insula是Sir Baldwin de Insula和Joan的儿子，于1303年2月2日出生在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特加可姆。他于大约1323年与Joan在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特加可姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John de Insula was born on 2 February 1303, in Gatcombe, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Baldwin de Insula and Joan. He married Joan about 1323, in Gatcombe, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Insulaは1303年2月2日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトガトコンベでSir Baldwin de InsulaとJoanの息子として生まれた。約1323年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトガトコンベでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Insula(은)는 1303년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 가트코브에서 Sir Baldwin de Insula(와)과 Joan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 가트코브에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John de Insula родился 2 февраля 1303 г. в местности гаткомб, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Baldwin de Insula и Joan. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan около 1323 г. в местности гаткомб, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
